button.name: action_back
button.invisible: is_edit or not id

button.name: action_edit
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_update
not id or is_edit or user_can_update

button.name: action_save
button.invisible: id and not is_edit
not is_edit

button.name: action_delete
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this data permanently?
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_delete
not id or is_edit or user_can_delete

field.name: note
field.placeholder: e.g. Payment terms: 30 days after invoice date

field.name: example_preview_discount
field.style: font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; background-color: transparent; border: none;

field.name: example_preview
field.style: font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; background-color: transparent; border: none;

button.name: action_edit
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_update
not id or is_edit or user_can_update

button.name: action_save
button.invisible: id and not is_edit
not is_edit

button.invisible: is_edit or not id

field.name: price_name
field.placeholder: e.g. a 10% discount for a particular customer-material combination

button.name: action_back_kanban
button.invisible: is_edit or not id

button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_update

button.invisible: id and not is_edit
not is_edit

button.invisible: is_edit or not id

button.name: action_edit
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_update
not id or is_edit or user_can_update

button.name: action_save
button.invisible: id and not is_edit
not is_edit

button.name: action_delete
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this data permanently?
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_delete
not id or is_edit or user_can_delete

button.name: action_back_to_quotations
button.invisible: is_edit or not id or context.get('is_approval_view') or state == 'sale' or is_quotation == False

button.name: action_back_to_approvals
button.invisible: is_edit or not id or not context.get('is_approval_view') or state == 'sale'

button.name: action_back_to_sales
button.invisible: is_edit or not id or (state not in ['sale', 'sale_draft', 'approved'] and is_quotation == False) or (state not in ['sale'] and is_quotation == True)

button.name: action_edit
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_update or state not in ['draft', 'sale_draft', 'approved', 'sent']
not id or is_edit or user_can_update or state not in ['draft', 'sale_draft', 'approved', 'sent']

button.name: action_save
button.invisible: id and not is_edit or is_revised

button.name: action_save_revised
button.invisible: id and not is_edit or not is_revised
not is_edit

button.name: action_delete_sales
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this data permanently?
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_delete or state not in ['draft', 'sale_draft', 'approved', 'sent']
not id or is_edit or user_can_delete or state not in ['draft', 'sale_draft', 'approved', 'sent']

button.name: action_quotation_send_custom
button.invisible: state not in ['draft', 'approved'] or not id or is_edit or need_approval or not user_can_send or not order_line_ids
state not in ['draft', 'approved'] or not id or is_edit or need_approval or user_can_send

button.name: action_submit_for_approval
button.invisible: state not in ['draft', 'sale_draft'] or not need_approval or not id or is_edit or not user_can_submit
state not in ['draft', 'sale_draft'] or not need_approval or not id or is_edit or user_can_submit

button.name: action_confirm
button.invisible: is_edit or (state not in ['sent'] and is_quotation == True) or (state not in ['sale_draft'] and is_quotation == False and not need_approval) or (state not in ['approved'] and is_quotation == False and need_approval) or not user_can_confirm
is_edit or (state not in ['sent'] and is_quotation == True) or (state not in ['sale_draft'] and is_quotation == False) or (state not in ['approved'] and is_quotation == False) or user_can_confirm

button.name: action_quotation_send_custom
button.invisible: state not in ['sent', 'approved'] or not id or is_edit or not user_can_send or is_quotation == False
state not in ['sent', 'approved'] or not id or is_edit or user_can_send or not order_line_ids

button.name: action_approve
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_approve or not context.get('is_approval_view')

button.name: action_revise
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_revise or not context.get('is_approval_view')

button.name: action_return
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_return or not context.get('is_approval_view')

button.name: action_reject
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_reject or not context.get('is_approval_view')

button.name: action_create_invoice_simple
button.invisible: invoice_status != 'to_invoice' or not user_can_invoicing
invoice_status != 'to_invoice' or user_can_invoicing

button.name: action_cancel
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this sales order?
button.invisible: state != 'sale' or is_edit or not user_can_delete
state != 'sale' or is_edit or user_can_delete

field.name: customer_id
field.readonly: state in ['cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: sold_to_id
field.readonly: state in ['cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: ship_to_id
field.readonly: state in ['cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: bill_to_id
field.readonly: state in ['cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: expiry_date
field.readonly: state in ['cancel', 'sale'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: payment_terms
field.readonly: state in ['cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: order_line_ids
field.readonly: state in ['cancel', 'wait_approval'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: note
field.readonly: state in ['cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

button.name: action_open_discount_wizard
button.invisible: state in ['sale', 'wait_approval', 'cancel'] or (not is_edit and id)

field.name: reason
field.placeholder: e.g. Discounts are too high, margins are below 5%...

field.name: reason
field.placeholder: e.g. Please provide more details about the order...

field.name: message
field.placeholder: e.g. Update delivery date to tomorrow, and reduce quantity from 10 to 5...

div.span: %%. Enter a discount percentage to apply to all order lines.

button.name: action_post
button.invisible: state != 'draft'

button.name: action_reset_to_draft
button.invisible: state != 'posted'

button.name: action_cancel
button.invisible: state != 'draft'

button.name: action_post
button.invisible: state != 'draft' or not user_can_invoicing
state != 'draft' or user_can_invoicing

button.name: action_send_invoice_by_email
button.invisible: state != 'posted'

button.name: action_register_payment
button.invisible: state != 'posted' or payment_state == 'paid' or not user_can_invoicing
state != 'posted' or payment_state != 'paid' or user_can_invoicing

button.name: action_open_credit_note_wizard
button.invisible: state != 'posted' or document_type != 'invoice' or not user_can_invoicing
state != 'posted' or document_type != 'invoice' or user_can_invoicing

button.name: action_view_credit_notes
button.invisible: credit_note_count == 0

button.name: action_cancel_invoice
button.invisible: state != 'draft'

button.name: action_set_to_draft
button.invisible: state not in ['cancel', 'posted'] or not user_can_invoicing or payment_state == 'paid'
state not in ['cancel', 'posted'] or user_can_invoicing

button.name: action_back
button.invisible: is_edit or not id

button.name: action_edit
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_update
not id or is_edit or user_can_update

button.name: action_save
button.invisible: id and not is_edit
not is_edit

button.name: action_delete
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this data permanently?
button.invisible: not id or is_edit or not user_can_delete
not id or is_edit or user_can_delete

field.name: help
field.p: A price is a set of sales prices or rules to compute the price of sales order lines based on products, product categories, dates and ordered quantities. This is the perfect tool to handle several pricings, seasonal discounts, etc.
You can assign pricelists to your customers.

field.name: help
field.p: Create a new customer in your address book
Odoo helps you easily track all activities related to a customer.

record.field: action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'name': 'Terms and Conditions', 'res_model': 'sales.terms_and_conditions', 'view_mode': 'form', 'target': 'main', 'res_id': env['sales.terms_and_conditions'].search([], limit=1).id, # Open the first record if exists }

field.name: help
field.p: Create your first Customer Sub Category

field.name: help
field.p: Create your first Unit of Measure

field.name: help
field.p: Create a new quotation, the first step of a new sale!

Once the quotation is confirmed, it becomes a sales order.
You will be able to create an invoice and collect the payment.

field.name: help
field.p: Create your first custom sales invoice

field.name: help
field.p: An approval matrix allows you to set up rules for approving sales orders based on criteria such as order amount, discount percentage, etc. You can define approvers for each rule, and when a sales order meets the criteria, it will be sent for approval to the designated approver(s).

field.name: help
field.p: No quotations waiting for your approval.

button.name: action_done
button.invisible: state != 'draft'

button.name: action_cancel
button.invisible: state != 'draft'
